name: Jing

skills.name: Lethal Reflections
skills.description: Jing and her image apply 2 different types of marks on enemies when they deal damage. If an enemy has both types of mark at the same time, they take damage and the cooldowns of Skill 1 and Skill 2 are reset.

skills.name: Reflective Assault
skills.description:
Dashes forward, damaging enemies in her path and slowing them while enhancing her next Basic Attack.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Shattered Illusions
skills.description:
Deals damage to nearby enemies while recovering Health and gaining increased Movement Speed.
If no mirror image is present on the battlefield, then one will be created to fight alongside her.

skills.name: Mirror Domain
skills.description: Dashes forward, pulling enemies to the center of her magic circle and immobilizing them there. She gains damage reduction while inside the circle, and recovers Health when she swaps locations.

tips: Jing (Assassin): Tier B on international ranked — 45.47% WR.
Build core: Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Meteor.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 45.47%, pick 0.44%, ban 0.17%, popularity tier B.
Counters Dharma, Ata, Lian Po · Weak into Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo.

faqs.question: Is Jing good in current season?
faqs.answer: Jing is Tier B Assassin with 45.47% win rate, 0.44% pick rate, and 0.17% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Jing build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Relentless Blade, Boots of Dexterity, Meteor, Axe of Torment, Boots of Resistance, Master Sword. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Jing?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Jing: Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo. Jing is strong into Dharma, Ata, Lian Po.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dharma, Ata, Lian Po. Countered by: Angela, Daji, Gan & Mo.
